reason: Illegal memory recordings plunge users into violent replay, exposing tech’s dark societal ripples.
Genetic profiling’s promise turns dystopian as engineered DNA dictates social and personal fates.
A glitch in online identity erases lives, warning of over-reliance on digital footprints.
Over-bureaucratic screens and tubes show near-future tech choking human connection in a Kafkaesque swirl.
Time-travel missions to stop a plague reveal the fragility of memory and society’s reliance on twisted science.
A realistic viral outbreak spirals out of control, spotlighting one lab mishap’s potential to shatter society.
Replicant bodies blur the line between human and machine in a grim near-future urban sprawl.
De-extinction theme-park tech unravels as dinosaurs showcase the hubris of resurrecting ancient life.
Liquid-metal terminator tech warns of unstoppable AI infiltration under a plausible near-future premise.
Behavior-modifying therapy drugs provoke chilling societal collapse in a gritty near-future Britain.
